feature.label: Subsequence Matching for JDT Content Assist
feature.description:
Provides subsequence (fuzzy) matching for Eclipse JDT Java content assist. Typing "hm" will match "HashMap", "sbu" will match "StringBuilder", etc. Matched characters are highlighted in bold.
Extracted from Eclipse Code Recommenders and rewritten as a lightweight standalone plugin with zero external dependencies beyond JDT.
feature.copyright: Copyright (c) 2010, 2024 Darmstadt University of Technology and others.
